rulings.Case Title: IN RE: QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Discharge Of Stakeholder And Release Of Proceeds
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 21, 2013, line 1. CLAIMANT TODD BANKS' Petition For Discharge Of Stakeholder And Release Of Proceeds Hearing required to address whether funds have been posted. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL WILEY VS. ADAM BRISTOL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 21, 2013, line 2. PETITIONER PAUL WILEY's Motion To Tax Costs GRANTED as to Memorandum of Costs filed on September 18, 2013, premature. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM PFLUGH et al VS. 2-4-6-8-10-12 STEINER STREET et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 21, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANTS 2-4-6-8-10-12 STEINER STREET, JANNA CHOW, DEBI GUNDERS and JOHN MCLAY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Moot, Second Amended Complaint filed on July 10, 2013. Defendants are not precluded from filing a new motion directed at Second Amended Complaint if Motion to Continue Trial is granted and sufficient time is provided. State Comp. Ins. Fund v. Superior Court (2010) 184 Cal.App.4th 1124, 1132. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE E. SANTOS COLORADO VS. THE BANK OF MELLON NEW YORK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss The Complaint By Defts
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 21, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON, FKA THE BANK OF NEW YORK's Motion To Dismiss The Complaint By Defendants Continued to December 24, 2013. Moving party is ordered again to comply with SFLR 2.6B (See 4/19/2013 minute order) and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers to Department 501 no later than December 13, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GSQUARED RESTAURANT VENTURES, LLC VS. COCOA DEVELOPMENT RETAIL, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 21, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT GHIRARDELLI ACQUISITION COMPANY, LLC's Motion For Protective Order DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden and show that disclosure of information regarding past leases of the property, which GAC does not own anymore, constitutes unwarranted annoyance to GAC or to the new owner of the property. CCP 2031.060(b).= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH TIERNEY VS. NASIR JAVAID et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 21, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANTS NASIR JAVAID and DEJAUNA JOSEPH's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to December 24, 2013. Moving party is ordered again to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than December 13, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH TIERNEY VS. NASIR JAVAID et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 21, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANTS NASIR JAVAID and DEJAUNA JOSEPH's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to December 24, 2013. Moving party is ordered again to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than December 13, 2013.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MCCORMACK BARON RAGAN MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. VS. SABRINA CARTER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc And Mtn For Enforcement Of Settlement Agreement And Entry Of Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 21, 2013, line 7. PLAINTIFF MCCORMACK BARON RAGAN MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC.'s Motion For Enforcement Of Settlement Agreement And Entry Of Judgment DENIED, moving party failed to sustain burden to show breach of the Stipulation. = (501/REQ)
